title: The Scaffolding Shadows
lines: You climb into the rusted scaffolding, the metal groaning like a dying beast beneath your weight.
Among the twisted girders and ancient silt, you find traces of those who came before: strange, oily glyphs etched into the steel, and a small, leather-bound pouch.
Inside the pouch is a handful of dried, bitter herbs that smell of ozone and old earth.

options.desc: Return to the center of the hangar
